text:
こんなうってつけの訓練場所を
後回しにしてたなんて迂闊だったなー。

近接と遠隔を使い分けるブレイバーなら
もっと早く来ておきたいエリアだよ。

でも難易度が高いのは事実だし
充分な技量を身につけてこそ
訓練に来る意味があるよね。

わたしたち、どれぐらい強くなってるか
いっちょ、試

I can't believe I could have forgotten about
such a perfect training ground as this.

Being a good Braver means mastering both
close-quarters and ranged combat, and a place
like this is just the perfect area for both.

This is no playground though, so maybe it's
best we saved it till now, when we've both
got a solid feel for our skills.

Here's where all that gets put to the test and
we see how good we really are!
